title: Scyphularia pycnocarpa
taxonomy: I can find information on this. Scyphularia pycnocarpa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, which is now considered to be within the family Plantaginaceae, and more recently, the family Scrophulariaceae is now part of the family Plantaginaceae,  commonly known as the figwort family. It is native to eastern Asia. The classification may also vary based on the most recent classification system.
